name: event-outbound
description: Generate multi-channel outbound sequences for AEs, SDRs, and event marketers working B2B trade shows, conferences, and industry events. Takes an event URL + your company URL + a target persona and produces email + LinkedIn sequences across a parameterised lead time (1-8 weeks). Built on 20k+ personalised touches across 50+ events that sourced $6M+ in pipeline across fintech (identity verification), cybersecurity, and B2B SaaS. Every touch is validated before it lands: subject under 4 words, body 50-100 words, banned-words blocklist, pronoun ratio favouring the reader, CTA pattern favouring concrete offers over meeting-asks.
